languages.text: {n}Трижды повторив процедуру ввода команды, Эоганн разочарованно хмыкает.{/n} "Нет, Нунциус, я уверен, что интерпретировал ответ машинного духа корректно. Он руководствуется простейшей бинарной логикой, а также строгой иерархией протоколов. И сейчас он скорее умрет, чем отворит нам путь".

{n}After repeating the command input sequence thrice, Eogunn huffs in disappointment.{/n} "No, Nuncius, I am certain that I interpreted the machine spirit's response correctly. It is guided by the simplest binharic logic, as well as a strict hierarchy of protocols. And right now, it would sooner die than open the way for us."
languages.original_text: {n}Трижды повторив процедуру ввода команды, Эоганн разочарованно хмыкает.{/n} "Нет, Нунциус, я уверен, что интерпретировал ответ машинного духа корректно. Он руководствуется простейшей бинарной логикой, а также строгой иерархией протоколов. И сейчас он скорее умрет, чем отворит нам путь".

It is guided by the simplest binharic logic, as well as a strict hierarchy of protocols. And right now, it would sooner die than open the way for us."

It is guided by the simplest binharic logic, as well as a strict hierarchy of protocols. And right now, it would sooner die than open the way for us."

It is guided by the simplest binharic logic, as well as a strict hierarchy of protocols. And right now, it would sooner die than open the way for us."

{n}After repeating the command input sequence thrice, Eogunn huffs in disappointment.{/n} "No, Nuncius, I am certain that I interpreted the machine spirit's response correctly. It is guided by the simplest binharic logic, as well as a strict hierarchy of protocols. And right now, it would sooner die than open the way for us."

languages.text: {n}Después de repetir la secuencia de comandos por tercera vez, Eogunn resopla, decepcionado.{/n} «No, Nuncius, estoy seguro de que he interpretado correctamente la respuesta del espíritu máquina. Sigue la lógica binaria más simple, así como una jerarquía estricta de protocolos. Ahora mismo, preferiría morir a abrirnos paso».
languages.original_text: {n}After repeating the command input sequence thrice, Eogunn huffs in disappointment.{/n} "No, Nuncius, I am certain that I interpreted the machine spirit's response correctly. It is guided by the simplest binharic logic, as well as a strict hierarchy of protocols. And right now, it would sooner die than open the way for us."

traits.locale_text: {n}Después de repetir la secuencia de comandos por tercera vez, Eogunn resopla, decepcionado.{/n} «No, Nuncius, estoy seguro de que he interpretado correctamente la respuesta del espíritu máquina. Sigue la lógica binaria más simple, así como una jerarquía estricta de protocolos. Ahora mismo, preferiría morir a abrirnos paso».

languages.text: {n}在重复了三次指令输入流程后，伊奥贡失望地叹了口气。{/n}“不，努恩修斯，我确信自己正确解读了机魂的回应。它遵循着最简单的二进制逻辑，以及严格的协议等级制度。而现在，它宁愿死，也不愿为我们打开通路。”
languages.original_text: {n}After repeating the command input sequence thrice, Eogunn huffs in disappointment.{/n} "No, Nuncius, I am certain that I interpreted the machine spirit's response correctly. It is guided by the simplest binharic logic, as well as a strict hierarchy of protocols. And right now, it would sooner die than open the way for us."

traits.locale_text: {n}在重复了三次指令输入流程后，伊奥贡失望地叹了口气。{/n}“不，努恩修斯，我确信自己正确解读了机魂的回应。它遵循着最简单的二进制逻辑，以及严格的协议等级制度。而现在，它宁愿死，也不愿为我们打开通路。”

languages.text: {n}Nachdem er die Eingabesequenz dreimal wiederholt hat, seufzt Eogunn enttäuscht.{/n} "Nein, Nuncius, ich bin sicher, dass ich die Antwort des Maschinengeistes korrekt übersetzt habe. Er folgt einer simplen binhärischen Logik und einer strikten Protokollhierarchie. Und im Moment würde er lieber sterben, als uns den Weg freimachen."
languages.original_text: {n}After repeating the command input sequence thrice, Eogunn huffs in disappointment.{/n} "No, Nuncius, I am certain that I interpreted the machine spirit's response correctly. It is guided by the simplest binharic logic, as well as a strict hierarchy of protocols. And right now, it would sooner die than open the way for us."

traits.locale_text: {n}Nachdem er die Eingabesequenz dreimal wiederholt hat, seufzt Eogunn enttäuscht.{/n} "Nein, Nuncius, ich bin sicher, dass ich die Antwort des Maschinengeistes korrekt übersetzt habe. Er folgt einer simplen binhärischen Logik und einer strikten Protokollhierarchie. Und im Moment würde er lieber sterben, als uns den Weg freimachen."

languages.text: {n}Après avoir répété trois fois la séquence de contrôle, Eogunn pousse un soupir de déception.{/n} « Non, Nuncius, je suis sûr d'avoir interprété correctement la réponse de l'esprit de la machine. Il est guidé par une logique binhaire rudimentaire et par une hiérarchie de protocoles très stricte. Et à l'heure actuelle, il préférerait mourir plutôt que de nous ouvrir. »
languages.original_text: {n}After repeating the command input sequence thrice, Eogunn huffs in disappointment.{/n} "No, Nuncius, I am certain that I interpreted the machine spirit's response correctly. It is guided by the simplest binharic logic, as well as a strict hierarchy of protocols. And right now, it would sooner die than open the way for us."

traits.locale_text: {n}Après avoir répété trois fois la séquence de contrôle, Eogunn pousse un soupir de déception.{/n} « Non, Nuncius, je suis sûr d'avoir interprété correctement la réponse de l'esprit de la machine. Il est guidé par une logique binhaire rudimentaire et par une hiérarchie de protocoles très stricte. Et à l'heure actuelle, il préférerait mourir plutôt que de nous ouvrir. »

languages.text: {n}Komut giriş dizisini üç kez tekrarladıktan sonra Eogunn, hayal kırıklığıyla ofluyor.{/n} "Hayır Nuncius, makine ruhunun tepkisini doğru yorumladığımdan eminim. En basit ikilidil mantığın yanı sıra katı bir protokol hiyerarşisince yönlendiriliyor. Şu anda bize yolu açmaktansa ölmeyi tercih eder."
languages.original_text: {n}After repeating the command input sequence thrice, Eogunn huffs in disappointment.{/n} "No, Nuncius, I am certain that I interpreted the machine spirit's response correctly. It is guided by the simplest binharic logic, as well as a strict hierarchy of protocols. And right now, it would sooner die than open the way for us."

traits.locale_text: {n}Komut giriş dizisini üç kez tekrarladıktan sonra Eogunn, hayal kırıklığıyla ofluyor.{/n} "Hayır Nuncius, makine ruhunun tepkisini doğru yorumladığımdan eminim. En basit ikilidil mantığın yanı sıra katı bir protokol hiyerarşisince yönlendiriliyor. Şu anda bize yolu açmaktansa ölmeyi tercih eder."

languages.text: {n}コマンド入力のシーケンスを3回繰り返した後、エオグンはがっかりしてため息をつく。{/n}「いいえ、ヌンシウス、私は機械の精霊の反応を正しく解釈したと確信しています。それは最も単純な二進法論理、そして厳格なプロトコルの階層に従っています。そして今、それは私たちのために道を開くよりも死を選ぶでしょう。」
languages.original_text: {n}After repeating the command input sequence thrice, Eogunn huffs in disappointment.{/n} "No, Nuncius, I am certain that I interpreted the machine spirit's response correctly. It is guided by the simplest binharic logic, as well as a strict hierarchy of protocols. And right now, it would sooner die than open the way for us."

traits.locale_text: {n}コマンド入力のシーケンスを3回繰り返した後、エオグンはがっかりしてため息をつく。{/n}「いいえ、ヌンシウス、私は機械の精霊の反応を正しく解釈したと確信しています。それは最も単純な二進法論理、そして厳格なプロトコルの階層に従っています。そして今、それは私たちのために道を開くよりも死を選ぶでしょう。」
